title: Sneak/Sprint Indicator
description: Simple HUD elements showing when you're sneaking or sprinting (⌐■_■)
body:
Simple configurable HUD elements showing when you're sneaking and/or sprinting. Uses the built-in icons for slowness(sneak) and speed(sprint).

If you play with the left-handed option, the mod adjusts the HUD accordingly so that everything fits together!

Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

Inspired by Roundaround's [Sprint Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/sprint-indicator)
